Urban district in Donetsk Oblast, Ukraine

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/24/Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG/250px-Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG)](/wiki/File:Raions_of_Donetsk_and_Donetsk_City_Municipality.PNG)

Districts of Donetsk on the territory of the Donetsk City Municipality:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Budonivskyi District  Voroshylovskyi District  Kalininskyi District  Kyivskyi District  Kirovskyi District | Kuibyshevskyi District  Leninskyi District  Petrovskyi District  Proletarskyi District |

**Voroshylovskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Ворошиловський район [Russian](/wiki/Russian_language "Russian language"): Ворошиловский район) is an urban district of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), Ukraine, named after [Marshal of the Soviet Union](/wiki/Marshal_of_the_Soviet_Union "Marshal of the Soviet Union") [Kliment Yefremovich Voroshilov](/wiki/Kliment_Voroshilov "Kliment Voroshilov").

It is the Donetsk's downtown and was created in 1973 after splitting away from the [Kalininskyi District, Donetsk](/wiki/Kalininskyi_District,_Donetsk "Kalininskyi District, Donetsk").
